items.title: Deer and Goose Processing
items.plainEnglish: It reads like animal logistics inside a federal procurement record. It may be perfectly reasonable — the weird part is seeing it as an official line item.
items.displayTitle: The deer and geese situation has reached procurement
items.punchline: The official title is just “DEER AND GOOSE PROCESSING,” which is either a contract notice or the world’s bleakest lunch menu.
